name: agent-builder
description: Standalone plugin companion for designing, evaluating, building, packaging, and deploying agentic harnesses, skills, and plugins with dual-format (Claude + AGENTS.md) output, polyglot scaffolding, repo structure, reusable skills, skill banks, and cross-host contracts

interface.shortDescription: Plugin companion for designing, evaluating, and building agentic harnesses, skills, and plugins
interface.longDescription: Standalone plugin companion for the Agent Builder app. It provides the cross-LLM skill, research synthesis, reusable templates, Prompt Builder prompt contracts, a Build Mode that scaffolds runnable skills/plugins with dual-format Claude SKILL.md + host-neutral AGENTS.md output and polyglot (Python/Rust/R/shell) script scaffolding, and an empirical catalog covering architectures, frameworks, memory substrates, lab patterns, local/open-source model agents, repo structure, reusable skill banks, skill chaining, and API/Claude/Codex deployment without requiring the local app.
